label: Task Board Clearout (Phase 4 + SIL items)
topWin: Phase 4 roguelite engine shipped — the game's core pitch is now fully playable. Also cleared all SIL debt including 2 escalated items.
topGap: Supabase remains the sole blocker. The game is feature-complete for launch; it just can't connect to the social backend yet.
ignisNote: Feature-complete for launch but entirely blocked on human infrastructure setup (Supabase). Code quality is high but engagement will stay at 2/10 until the backend goes live.
